positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical mandala design featuring interconnected flora and fauna elements, rendered in a modern bohemian aesthetic. The primary subjects include stylized celestial bodies (crescent moons, stars, planets) interwoven with detailed botanical illustrations (palm leaves, ferns, lotus flowers) and abstract geometric patterns. Use a color palette dominated by deep teal, burnt ochre, dusty rose, and creamy ivory. The composition must be centered and radial, designed to be a seamless, repeat-friendly print suitable for a t-shirt graphic. The style should evoke linocut etching combined with fine-line engraving, ensuring strong, clear silhouettes and high contrast. Studio shot, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, high detail, clean lines.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, bokeh, cropped, dirty, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, solid color fill, photographic, photorealism
